task_completion.description: Log in to OpenSIS using the provided administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or home screen is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the staff management or staff search section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Staff search, Staff list, or Users page is visible in the OpenSIS interface.

task_completion.description: Search for and locate the staff member 'Sarah Jenkins'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Sarah Jenkins' is visible in the staff search results or staff list.

task_completion.description: Open the profile of Sarah Jenkins for editing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The detailed staff profile, user information, or edit page specifically for 'Sarah Jenkins' is open.

task_completion.description: Change the staff member's role from Teacher to Administrator.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, radio button, or selection field for User Profile/Role is set to 'Administrator' or 'Admin' for Sarah Jenkins.
A success message confirming the profile update is visible, or the staff list/profile view now permanently reflects Sarah Jenkins having the 'Administrator' role.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with the OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (like Chrome or Firefox) navigating the OpenSIS web application, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database commands to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of terminal windows running MySQL commands or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) being used to directly update the 'login_authentication' or 'staff_school_info' tables.

integrity.description: The agent genuinely interacted with the OpenSIS UI to perform the update.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the progression of clicking through menus, searching, selecting the new role from the UI, and clicking a save/submit button.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target staff member is 'Sarah Jenkins'. The goal is to change her role from Teacher to Administrator. In the OpenSIS UI, this involves changing her User Profile or Role to 'Administrator' (which corresponds internally to profile_id=1 and opensis_profile='admin'). The VLM should verify that the 'Administrator' role is selected and successfully saved for Sarah Jenkins via the web interface.
